name: Pain & Suffering in Utah Work Injury Cases

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for pain and suffering in a workplace injury in Sandy?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer for pain and suffering in a workplace injury in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy barring gross negligence or intentional acts.

suggestedAnswer.text: Exceptions rare: intentional harm, fraud. Third-party suits possible (e.g., equipment maker). Protects employers but limits recovery; dual claims strategy key.

description: No, Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy barring gross negligence or intentional acts.
